profile.name: Mark
profile.about: I am a Cyber Security student at Universitas Amikom Yogyakarta with a strong passion for Offensive Security. My interests include Vulnerability Assessment & Penetration Testing (VAPT), Web Application Security Testing, Malware Analysis, Digital Forensics, and Capture The Flag (CTF). I continuously improve my practical skills through cybersecurity bootcamps, hands-on laboratories, personal security projects, and real-world practice.

experience.company: Focus: Penetration Testing · Web Penetration Testing · Security Fundamentals
Hackpoint — Web Penetration Testing · OWASP Top 10 · DVWA
IDNetworkers — Linux · Networking Security · Security Fundamentals

projects.title: MotoGP Automation
projects.description: Python-based automation testing framework using Selenium to automatically test the MotoGP website, built with a clean, easy-to-extend project structure.

projects.title: HeaderGuard
projects.description: A website security header analyzer that inspects a site's HTTP security headers, flags misconfigurations, and provides recommendations based on modern security best practices.

projects.title: HomeService
projects.description: A home service booking website offering various household services through a web-based reservation system.

projects.title: MalRev Reverse Engineering
projects.description: Reverse engineering and behavioral analysis documentation of a Linux ransomware sample (64-bit ELF), covering static & dynamic analysis, workflow, IOCs, encryption techniques, and YARA-based detection methods.

projects.title: YaraRule MalRev Detection
projects.description: A collection of custom YARA rules built from the MalRev analysis findings, designed to detect malware indicators through signature-based detection.

projects.title: Flappy Bird v2.5
projects.description: A Flappy Bird remake built with Python and Pygame, featuring clean architecture, a modern UI, and a professional project structure.

projects.title: ByteStore
projects.description: An e-commerce website deployed on a real Ubuntu Server, covering full-stack web development alongside hands-on server, database, and Linux configuration.

projects.title: BITE (Bug Inspection & Testing Engine)
projects.description: A modular, Python-based penetration testing framework built for beginners with a professional project structure, designed to be easy to extend with new security testing modules. Built for educational purposes and authorized penetration testing only.

certificates.title: CCNA: Enterprise Networking, Security, and Automation
CCNA: Switching, Routing, and Wireless Essentials

services.title: Vulnerability Assessment & Penetration Testing
services.desc: Identifying and exploiting security vulnerabilities in web applications and network infrastructure using industry-standard tools and methodologies.

services.title: Digital Forensics & Malware Analysis
services.desc: Conducting in-depth forensic investigations and analyzing malware to uncover threats, trace attacks, and support incident response.

services.title: Networking
services.desc: Designing and analyzing network topologies, configuring devices, and implementing security controls across wired and wireless environments.
